narrative:
Center Township has 2,143 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.4 percentage points.
